Enchantments.Toxic: Your Poison items have + Poison equal to 10% of this item's value.
Enchantments.Fiery: Your Burn items have + Burn equal to 10% of this item's value.
Enchantments.Shiny: This has double Max Health bonus.
Enchantments.Deadly: Your items have Crit Chance equal to this item's value.
Enchantments.Radiant: Your items are affected by Freeze and Slow for half as long.
Enchantments.Obsidian: Your Weapons have + Damage equal to half this item's value.
